creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

1. Are you sure it's OK to update to a relese candidate ? (at least 
specify this in the PR).  2. The change you did in the PR is wrong (it's 
OK if someone is upgading, but if someone just stops using the port I 
think it's more user-friendly to know the logs are left so he can rm 
them by hand).
